spec.description: Monitoring dashboard for the WCF-based Presales application.

spec.title: Service Status
spec.description: Whether the presales service is currently up and reporting metrics.

spec.title: CPU Usage Rate
spec.description: Total CPU time consumed per second (user + system) by the presales process.

spec.title: Memory Usage
spec.description: Physical memory (working set) used by the presales process.

spec.title: Exception Rate
spec.description: Rate of .NET exceptions thrown per second in the presales service.

spec.title: HTTP Client Request Rate (by Status Code)
spec.description: Rate of outbound HTTP requests per second from the presales service, broken down by HTTP response status code.

spec.title: HTTP Client Latency (P95 / P50)
spec.description: 95th percentile latency of outbound HTTP client calls made by the presales service.

spec.title: HTTP Client Error Rate (by Error Type)
spec.description: Rate of failed outbound HTTP requests, grouped by error type.

spec.title: DB Operation Rate (by Response Code)
spec.description: Rate of database operations per second from the presales service, broken down by DB response status code.

spec.title: DB Operation Duration (P95 / P50)
spec.description: 95th and 50th percentile duration of database operations from the presales service.

spec.title: DB Error Rate (by Error Type)
spec.description: Rate of failed database operations grouped by error type (e.g. SQL exceptions).

spec.title: GC Collections Rate (by Generation)
spec.description: Rate of .NET garbage collection events per second, split by generation (gen0, gen1, gen2).

spec.title: GC Heap Size
spec.description: Total size of live objects on the GC heap in the presales process.

spec.title: .NET Exception Rate
spec.description: Number of exceptions thrown per second by the .NET runtime of the presales service.

spec.title: Thread Count
spec.description: Total number of threads active in the presales process.

spec.title: CPU Time (User vs System)
spec.description: CPU time consumed per second by the presales process, split into user-space and kernel-space (system) time.

spec.title: Memory Usage (Physical vs Virtual)
spec.description: Physical memory (working set) and virtual memory consumed by the presales process over time.

spec.title: Assemblies & CPU Cores
spec.description: Number of .NET assemblies loaded by the presales process and total available CPU cores.

spec.title: Presales – Application Overview
